commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a pinned deadcode lint step to CI and removes unreachable Go helpers from internal packages.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is CI and cleanup work, not a bug report. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the deadcode gate and the removed helper names do not have live call sites in the searched tree.
